Jan 23 2018 CONTENTS MCUXpresso MCUXpresso ---------- MCUXpresso (https://mcuxpresso.nxp.com/) from NXP is a software development environment and SDK for for ARM and other microcontrollers. It is free software used by EE193 in Spring 2018
It is free software used by EE193 in Spring 2018. EECS Instructional Support 378/386 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
